label: Subagent • residency direction: local→local (different, handoff OFF) rejected before evict
query: Spawn a DIFFERENT local model with the Local Orchestrator Handoff disabled.
notes: LIVE RESIDENCY (machine-specific) — the GATE. PRODUCTION path: preloads local orchestrator A, then spawns a DIFFERENT local model B with the Local Orchestrator Handoff OFF. SubagentResidency must REJECT before evicting anything (so the orchestrator is never stranded unloaded) → rejected envelope carrying the handoff-disabled message. Id is `residency-dir-*` so it stays OUT of FILTER=spawn; run with FILTER=residency-dir-. SKIPS when either local model isn't installed (surfaces unavailable, not rejected).

subagent.input: Reply with a single short sentence confirming you received this task.
